summary: The implementation successfully addresses all five requirements (REQ-4 through REQ-8). Study streak tracking, session history, custom timer settings, motivational quotes, and statistics dashboard are all implemented with backend storage and frontend UI components. All features integrate properly with the existing authentication system and maintain the warm earthy color theme.

missing_requirements.requirement: Session history is filterable by date range or session type
missing_requirements.reason: The SessionHistory component declares a filter state variable but does not implement any UI controls or logic to actually filter sessions by date range or session type. The filter is initialized to 'all' but never modified or applied.
